sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15881" key="a)rxesi/molpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχεσίμολπος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n15881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beginning the strain,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Μοῦσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
